channel.title: meetups on Hart Hoover
channel.description: Recent content in meetups on Hart Hoover

item.title: The San Antonio DevOps Meetup: A Retrospective
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: The San Antonio DevOps meetup is no more, so I wanted to document my thoughts and feelings on what was good, what was terrible, and if I did it again, what I would change.
